intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent or non-viable. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but in a state of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos specimen identified by the white rabbit anchor, though severely compromised.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only soil/substrate. No foliage detected.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot appears empty or contains only substrate.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos shows extreme chlorosis and structural collapse. The white rabbit anchor remains, but the plant is barely visible.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Substrate appears consistently dark and potentially waterlogged or compacted.
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None detected, though low light makes surface inspection difficult.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a spoon (T-2) and a white cylindrical object (T-1) indicates human intervention/maintenance attempts.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-3: Initial state shows minimal growth; P3 shows a single green sprout.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Introduction of a spoon into the biome; potential soil disturbance.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Introduction of a white cylindrical object; P3 sprout appears to be wilting.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total loss of visible plant structure; the biome has entered a state of complete dormancy or death.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total failure. The lack of light, combined with potential over-saturation of the soil and lack of viable photosynthetic tissue, suggests the specimens are beyond recovery.
anomalies: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (T-1).
Complete disappearance of the P3 sprout by CURRENT.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a catastrophic decline across all registered pots. Starting from a state of minimal viability, the specimens have suffered from what appears to be a combination of environmental stress and potential over-handling. By the current timestamp, no living plant matter is discernible. The biome is effectively a collection of empty pots.
